extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each entity: all “By” rows were excluded; against-company has Criminal Nil, Tax 2, Statutory/Regulatory Nil and ₹2.04 million, while against-subsidiaries has Nil in all categories and no amount. The against-promoters and against-directors rows were excluded from the group aggregate amount because the quantified director matter is personal to directors; the tax count therefore includes only the 2 company tax proceedings, while criminal and regulatory counts are zero. The contingent-liabilities figure is the stated contingent-liabilities amount of ₹2.04 million as at September 30, 2025; commitments of ₹248.15 million were not included. Company-wide top-customer concentration is reported for Fiscal 2025 as 31.75% for the top five and 47.87% for the top ten, based on revenue from sale of products and services/revenue from operations, not a business segment. The source tables use ₹ million; ₹2.04 million ÷ 10 = ₹0.204 crore, and all crore fields below use that conversion.
